actual_title: Representation and the Shape of Computation

cards.title: Representation
cards.governance_note: State what the algorithm can and cannot see through the chosen representation.

cards.title: Operation Fit
cards.governance_note: Choose representation shapes that support the intended computational procedures.

cards.title: Information Loss
cards.governance_note: Document what is omitted, compressed, simplified, or aggregated.

cards.title: Traceability
cards.governance_note: Preserve metadata, provenance, versions, assumptions, and transformation logs.
